content.problemStatement:
Chef loves rectangles and he wants to draw one with the largest area possible, but the problem is that his pen has only enough ink left to draw a total of NNN unit length of line.

Help him find the largest area of a rectangle which he can draw if he wants to draw **rectangles with integral sides only**.

**Note** that he does **NOT** need to finish all the ink.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single integer NNN on a new line, denoting the ink left.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the area of the largest rectangle Chef can draw.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1: The maximum area Chef can get by drawing a rectangle is 444, by drawing a rectangle whose length and breadth are both 222 units, using up all his ink left.
Test case 2: There is not enough ink to draw any rectangle.
Test case 3: The maximum area Chef can get by drawing a rectangle is 121212, by drawing a rectangle whose length is 444 and breadth is 333.
